career:doctor:UK.salary_range: NHS GP partner: GBP 100K-150K/yr; salaried GP: GBP 65K-90K; locum: GBP 80-120/hr
career:doctor:UK.key_constraints: NHS pension scheme (significant asset), partnership buy-in capital, indemnity costs rising

career:doctor:general.salary_range: Varies by country; specialist earnings 2-5x primary care
career:doctor:general.key_constraints: Training duration limits early wealth accumulation; burnout risk high

wealth:property:UK.entry_capital: GBP 30K-60K deposit typical for BTL; stamp duty surcharge 3%
wealth:property:UK.strategy: Buy-to-let in university cities or commuter towns; HMO conversion for higher yield
wealth:property:UK.timeline: First property typically age 28-35 for professionals; portfolio of 3-5 by age 45

wealth:property:general.principle: Property as wealth vehicle requires leverage discipline and 10+ year horizon
wealth:property:general.strategy: Primary residence first, then income-generating assets

wealth:investment:UK.vehicles: ISA (GBP 20K/yr tax-free), SIPP pension (40% tax relief), VCT/EIS for higher risk
wealth:investment:UK.returns: UK equity market long-term average 7-8% nominal; bonds 3-4%
wealth:investment:UK.timeline: ISA millionaire achievable in 20-25 years with consistent GBP 20K/yr contributions

wealth:business:general.principle: Entrepreneurial wealth requires 3-5 year runway and domain expertise

relationship:marriage:general.context: Chart timing for relationship formation typically involves Venus/7th house activation
relationship:marriage:general.practical: Long-term partnership stability correlates with shared values more than chart compatibility

relationship:children:general.context: 5th house activation + Jupiter transits traditionally indicate fertility windows
relationship:children:general.practical: Medical fertility declines after 35; chart timing should be weighed against biological reality
relationship:children:general.note: Astrology cannot predict child gender — this is a firm limitation

health:general.context: 6th house and planetary dignities indicate constitutional tendencies, not diagnoses
health:general.practical: Chart health indicators are tendencies, not medical advice. Always consult a doctor.
health:general.note: Moon-related health: emotional regulation, sleep quality, digestive sensitivity

health:mental:general.context: Saturn-Moon aspects traditionally indicate tendency toward melancholy/depression
health:mental:general.practical: Mental health support should always be professional; chart indicators identify vulnerability windows

spiritual:buddhist.alignment: Saturn periods suit disciplined Samatha practice; Jupiter periods suit Dhamma study and teaching
spiritual:buddhist.tradition: Theravada framework: chart as kamma indicator, not fate determinant

relocation:UK.context: Astrocartography and local space charts can indicate favorable regions
relocation:UK.practical_cities: London (highest earning potential, highest cost); Manchester/Birmingham (growing medical hubs); Edinburgh (quality of life + medical excellence)

timing:general.principle: Multiple system convergence (3+) narrows timing to 1-3 month windows
timing:general.limitation: Single-system timing has ±6 month variance; treat as season, not date
